title: What is QuickCrate Plus and what are its benefits?
body: QuickCrate Plus is our premium subscription plan designed for frequent shoppers who want the best experience. For ₹299/month or ₹2,499/year (equivalent to ~₹208/month, saving ₹1,089 annually), QuickCrate Plus members enjoy: Free delivery on all orders (no minimum order value required), Priority dispatch (your order is picked and dispatched before non-Plus orders during peak hours), 2x QuickRewards points on every purchase, Early access to flash sales (15 minutes before the general public), Priority customer support (shorter wait times and dedicated queue), Access to Plus-exclusive products and bundle deals, and free scheduled slot booking during high-demand periods. The subscription is auto-renewed unless cancelled. Calculate your savings: if you order 20 times a month with an average delivery fee of ₹25, Plus saves you ₹500 in delivery fees alone.

title: How do I subscribe to QuickCrate Plus?
body: Subscribing to QuickCrate Plus is easy. Go to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Subscribe. Choose your plan: monthly (₹299/month) or annual (₹2,499/year). Select your payment method — the first charge is taken immediately, and subsequent renewals are automated on the same date each month or year. Subscriptions can be paid via auto-debit from UPI, stored card, or QuickCrate Wallet. After payment, your Plus benefits are activated instantly — you'll see a Plus badge on your profile. If you're not satisfied, you can cancel within the first 7 days for a full refund (see cancellation policy). QuickCrate also offers a 30-day free trial for first-time Plus subscribers — you won't be charged until the trial ends, and you can cancel anytime during the trial without cost.

title: How do I cancel my QuickCrate Plus subscription?
body: You can cancel your QuickCrate Plus subscription at any time from Account → QuickCrate Plus → Manage Subscription → Cancel. Upon cancellation, your Plus benefits remain active until the end of the current billing period (you've already paid for). You won't be charged for the next billing cycle. If you cancel within 7 days of subscribing (or within 7 days of a renewal charge), you're eligible for a full refund of that billing period's charge under our satisfaction guarantee. After 7 days, refunds are not provided for partial periods. If you subscribed via the App Store or Google Play, you must cancel through the respective platform's subscription management (App Store → Settings → Subscriptions, or Google Play → Manage Subscriptions) — in-app cancellation won't stop platform-billed subscriptions.

title: What happens to my Plus benefits if my renewal payment fails?
body: If your QuickCrate Plus renewal payment fails (e.g., due to an expired card or insufficient balance), QuickCrate will attempt to charge your payment method up to 3 times over 5 days. You'll receive notifications for each failed attempt. If all retries fail, your Plus subscription will be paused and your benefits will be suspended. You can reactivate by going to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Reactivate and updating your payment method. During the pause period, any orders placed will be charged standard delivery fees. QuickRewards points earned during the pause will still be valid at the 1x (non-Plus) rate. If you reactivate within 30 days of the pause, your subscription anniversary date and any accumulated QuickRewards tier progress are preserved. After 30 days, a fresh subscription starts.

title: Can I share my QuickCrate Plus subscription with family?
body: QuickCrate Plus is currently an individual subscription — it is tied to your account and phone number and cannot be formally shared as a family plan. However, if multiple family members use the same QuickCrate account (with the account holder's phone number), they all benefit from Plus perks on that account. Family Plan (multi-account Plus sharing) is a feature on our roadmap and will be announced when available. As a workaround, you can purchase a Plus subscription as a gift for a family member: go to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Gift a Subscription, enter the recipient's phone number registered on QuickCrate, choose the plan duration, and complete payment. The recipient gets a separate Plus subscription on their own account for the purchased duration.

title: Does QuickCrate Plus offer free delivery on all orders?
body: Yes, QuickCrate Plus includes free delivery on all orders, regardless of order value. Standard accounts without Plus pay a delivery fee that varies by distance from the dark store, typically ₹15-₹40 per order, plus a handling fee of ₹10 for orders below ₹99. With Plus, both the delivery fee and the small-order handling fee are waived on every order. This alone makes Plus worthwhile for users who order more than 8-10 times per month. Free delivery applies to all serviceable zones and all product categories, including same-day scheduled orders. Note: if a specific item has a special delivery requirement (e.g., bulky appliances requiring a dedicated vehicle), an additional logistics charge may still apply and is not covered by Plus — this is disclosed on the product listing page.

title: How do I upgrade from a monthly to an annual QuickCrate Plus plan?
body: To switch from a monthly to an annual QuickCrate Plus plan, go to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Manage Subscription → Upgrade to Annual. If you upgrade mid-cycle, the remaining days of your current monthly plan are calculated and their value is credited toward the annual plan's cost. So you pay only the pro-rated difference, not the full annual price on top of what you've already paid. The upgrade takes effect immediately and your new anniversary date is set to one year from today. The annual plan at ₹2,499/year works out to about ₹208/month — a savings of ₹1,089 compared to paying monthly (₹299 × 12 = ₹3,588). The annual plan is recommended for regular shoppers ordering 15+ times per month.

title: Is there a free trial for QuickCrate Plus?
body: Yes, QuickCrate offers a 30-day free trial of QuickCrate Plus for first-time subscribers. During the trial, you have full access to all Plus benefits: free delivery, priority dispatch, 2x QuickRewards points, early sale access, and priority support. To activate the trial, go to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Start Free Trial and add a payment method (required to start the trial, but you won't be charged during the trial period). If you don't cancel before the 30-day trial ends, you'll be automatically enrolled in the monthly plan at ₹299/month. You can cancel the trial at any time from Account → QuickCrate Plus → Manage Subscription → Cancel Trial. Each phone number is eligible for the free trial only once. Trial is not available if you have had a Plus subscription previously.

title: Are QuickCrate Plus fees refundable?
body: QuickCrate Plus fees are refundable within the first 7 days of a new subscription or renewal — this is our satisfaction guarantee. To request a refund, go to Account → QuickCrate Plus → Manage Subscription → Request Refund (available only within the 7-day window). The refund is processed to your original payment method within 5-7 business days. After 7 days, subscription fees are non-refundable, though your benefits continue until the paid period ends. If you subscribed through the App Store, refund requests must be made through Apple's refund portal (reportaproblem.apple.com). Google Play subscriptions must be refunded via Google Play's refund policy (within 48 hours of subscription). QuickCrate has no control over platform-billed subscription refunds beyond our app.

title: What exclusive products are available for QuickCrate Plus members?
body: QuickCrate Plus members get access to a curated selection of Plus-exclusive products not available to regular users. These include: premium imported groceries and specialty items (artisan cheeses, craft beverages, organic imports), early-access pre-orders for limited-edition products, exclusive bundle deals (e.g., wellness kits, gourmet snack packs) at prices unavailable publicly, and partner brand exclusives (cosmetics, nutrition, health supplements) offered through brand partnerships. Plus-exclusive products are tagged with a gold 'Plus Exclusive' badge in the catalog and are only visible and purchasable when logged in with a Plus account. The Plus exclusive catalog is refreshed monthly. Plus members also get first access to QuickCrate's new private-label products ('QuickCrate Select') before they're listed publicly.
